repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: Four memories are selected because they directly match the current opbuild failure in tall_skinny_matrix_multiplication: id=83fce76b captures the exact sequence of op_host/CMakeLists.txt:4 (opbuild) followed by 'No rule to make target'; id=a2b475d5 mentions the same 'Configuring incomplete, errors occurred!' at the same CMakeLists line; id=893b2208 addresses opbuild errors in tiling functions (the error occurs in TilingFunc); id=0342a1a9 warns against incorrect usage of context->GetInputShape (the compilation error is a type mismatch on that call). Together they provide diverse clues for fixing the root cause and the subsequent build failure.
